tasks.name: SignalConfig min_clamp <= max_clamp Validator
tasks.description: Add model_validator(mode='after') to SignalConfig that raises ValueError when both min_clamp and max_clamp are set and min_clamp > max_clamp. Single-sided clamp (only one set) and equal values are valid. Test: reversed clamps raise, equal pass, single-sided pass, neither pass.

tasks.name: ClockDriftConfig Allow Negative Values
tasks.description: Remove non-negative validators on initial_offset_ms and drift_rate_s_per_day in ClockDriftConfig. Negative values are valid (clock behind, clock losing time). Optionally guard against NaN/Inf. Test: negative offset and drift rate accepted without error.

tasks.name: Fix Calibration Drift Rate Docstring
tasks.description: Clarify SteadyStateModel docstring: calibration_drift_rate is in units/second internally, PRD specifies units/hour, callers must divide by 3600. Add inline comment at the application line. No code logic change.

tasks.name: Fix Random Walk Docstring
tasks.description: Replace misleading docstring claiming sqrt(dt) scaling with correct description: innovation = drift_rate * N(0,1), delta scaled by linear dt per PRD 4.2.5. Note difference from steady-state O-U drift which uses sqrt(dt).

tasks.name: Dryer Zone Cholesky Correlation
tasks.description: Add PRD 4.3.1 Cholesky noise correlation for dryer zones (3x3 matrix: 1-2=0.1, 1-3=0.02, 2-3=0.1). Pattern: import CholeskyCorrelator, build noise generators separately from FirstOrderLagModel (avoid double-noising), generate 3 N(0,1) draws per tick, apply Cholesky factor, scale by effective_sigma, add to raw temps. Allow custom matrix via dryer_zone_correlation_matrix in equipment extras. Test: positive sample correlation between zones with known seed.

tasks.name: Oven Zone Cholesky Correlation
tasks.description: Add PRD 4.3.1 Cholesky noise correlation for oven zones (3x3 matrix: 1-2=0.15, 1-3=0.05, 2-3=0.15). Same pattern as 6c.5 but in OvenGenerator. Thermal coupling (physical model) and Cholesky (noise correlation) are independent — both should coexist. Allow custom matrix via oven_zone_correlation_matrix. Test: positive sample correlation, higher than dryer correlation.

tasks.name: Coil 4 Derivation Fix
tasks.description: Change Coil 4 (laminator.running) from CoilDefinition(4, 'press.machine_state', derive_value=2) to CoilDefinition(4, 'laminator.web_speed', mode='gt_zero'). Matches Coil 5 pattern and derives from laminator's own signal. Test: coil True when laminator speed > 0, False when 0, independent of press state.

tasks.name: OPC-UA MinimumSamplingInterval
tasks.description: Set MinimumSamplingInterval attribute on all OPC-UA variable nodes. Use sig_cfg.sample_rate_ms if set, else config.simulation.tick_interval_ms. In asyncua use write_attribute(AttributeIds.MinimumSamplingInterval, DataValue(Variant(ms, VariantType.Double))). Test: read attribute from node, verify equals expected ms value.

tasks.name: Validate All Fixes — Full Suite
tasks.description: Run ruff + mypy + pytest full suite. Run batch sim with both profiles (packaging + F&B). Verify no regressions. Fix any failures.
